summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TruckService Pro CRM - all 41 backend API tests PASSED, frontend UI verification successful across all major modules including Dashboard, Work Orders, Customers, Technicians, Inventory, Payments, CRM/Lead Management, Online Scheduler, Walk-Around, Integrations, and Admin Code Editor.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is well-structured with proper auth, clean_doc function excludes MongoDB _id properly
Frontend uses proper API service abstraction with axios interceptors for auth
All CRUD operations verified working through comprehensive pytest suite
seed_data_creation: Seed data auto-generated on startup including users, customers, trucks, technicians, work_orders, inventory_items, purchase_orders, appointments, payments, leads, and integrations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs verified working with pytest. Frontend UI tested with Playwright - login, dashboard KPIs, work order CRUD with approval/reject/delete, customer detail with trucks and service history, technician skill matrix editing, inventory with auto-replenish, payments processing, CRM lead call/email/sms interactions, walk-around inspection, online scheduler multi-step flow, integrations with sync operations, and admin code editor all functional.

features_verified.Dashboard: Working - KPIs, pending approvals, in-progress orders, service revenue chart
features_verified.Customers: Working - list/detail modal with trucks and service history
features_verified.Technicians: Working - cards, skill matrix, edit skills dialog
features_verified.Inventory: Working - stock levels, auto-replenish creates POs
features_verified.CRM_Lead_Management: Working - leads with scores, call/email/sms/360 actions
features_verified.Walk_Around: Working - inspection areas, notes, upload, damage markers, save
features_verified.Integrations: Working - SAP/Logile connected, test connection, sync operations
features_verified.Admin_Code_Editor: Working - page selection, JS/CSS/Actions tabs, save

mocked_apis_note: External enterprise integrations (SAP, Logile, DOS Matrix) and Diesel Laptops DTC/Parts lookup return simulated responses - noted in review request as expected
